changes.task: Create Transaction and TransactionEntry ent schemas
changes.description: Created Transaction (journal header) and TransactionEntry (journal legs) ent schemas with all edges. Updated existing schemas with forward edges (transactions, entries).

changes.task: Create transaction service with double-entry logic
changes.description: Implemented TransactionService with AddExpense and AddIncome methods using DB transactions, atomic balance updates, and double-entry invariant enforcement. Added 5 tests covering happy paths, invalid amounts, and cumulative balances.

Added addExpense and addIncome mutations with input types. Implemented resolvers that authenticate users, resolve household membership and accounts, then delegate to TransactionService. Wired TransactionService into Resolver and main.go.
